🔴 Bugs Found (2)

HIGH BUG-004 JavaScript errors detected (1 error)
Description

The module has 1 JavaScript error(s) running in the background. This can cause silent failures in quiz scoring, animations, or SCORM data reporting.

Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open index.html in Chrome
  2. Press F12 → Console tab
  3. Observe red error messages on load
Error Messages
[bundle] error [bundle] error [bundle] error
Impact
May cause unexpected behaviour, broken interactions, or incorrect score reporting.
📸 Screenshot captured automatically by QA script
HIGH BUG-006 3 external image(s) failed to load
Description

The module links to 3 image(s) hosted on external servers (e.g. Google Drive). These images are either private, deleted, or the sharing permission has expired.

Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open index.html
  2. Observe blank spaces where images should appear
  3. Check browser console for 403/404 errors on external URLs
Affected URLs
❌ https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/d/1F5p0whUe3A78rhAuxoUxu6uqBDpMUpj-=w800
❌ https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/d/1uCLlCXwELoTfD9MxqQF3XCqvoUR1ObHN=w800
❌ https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/d/1zeC2DHn9OuNgXAwexTN41B44NlWwyU91=w800
Impact
Visual content is missing. SCORM packages should never depend on external URLs — all assets must be bundled inside the ZIP.
